direction: pass caller-computed boundary wave speed into BOUNDA
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already computes CL as sqrt(9.81 * H1) before dispatching boundary sides to BOUNDA, but the parent BOUNDA helper recomputes sqrt(9.81 * H_pre) for the same supercritical boundary check. Passing the existing CL into BOUNDA removes that redundant square root on boundary sides while preserving the same comparison value and all flux arithmetic.
